title: is not null syntax error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name TEXT, value REAL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO t1 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 10.50);
SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM t1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL OR name IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: using IS NOT NULL with undefined function
